calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Continued To Nov-28-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Nov-29-2005 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Stipulation for entry of future judgment, and Court Trial/Prove-Up on Defaulted Defendant.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Daniel Bornstein, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Lino Rizzi, also present.
Co-Defendant: Manuela Pandolfi, present in pro per, settled for Stipulation for entry of future judgment signed by the parties and filed in court, but not read into the record. See scanned doc for details of the settlement.
No appearance by the Defaulted Defendant: Danny Watters.
Exhibit 1 - Lease Agreement-------------------------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2 - Three-day notice------------------------ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: Danny Watters as follows:
Restitution and possession of the premises located at 1753 Revere Ave. Lower Unit, San Francisco.
Back Rent and Damages of $1,793.00
Rental Agreement declared forfeited.
Counsel stipulated for the return of the Exhibits in open court, and to submit a Judgment and Dismissal per terms of the settlement.

MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Nov-28-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-22-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: JONATHAN BORNSTEIN FOR PLAINTIFF LINO RIZZI
NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT MANUELA PANDOLFI

SETTLMENT CONFERENCE OFF CALENDAR. JURY DEMAND STRICKEN. TO PROCEED AS COURT TRIAL.

COMMISSIONER: SUE KAPLAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS; NOT REPORTED (218)
